name: Apple Cheddar Nut Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. Using a pastry blender or fork, cut in margarine until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Stir in cheese and nuts. Add apple sauce; stir just until moistened.
5. Turn off heat source. On a floured surface, knead dough gently 5 to 6 times.
6. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Press into an 8-inch circle, about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cut into wedges. Separate slightly.
8. Bake at 400°F for 12 to 16 minutes or until lightly browned.
9. Serve warm.
